summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of purchase return functionality. All APIs working correctly with proper partial/full return handling and RETURNED status support.
passed_tests: POST /api/purchases - Creates purchase with lot IN_STORE status
POST /api/purchase-returns - Partial return reduces quantity, keeps lot IN_STORE
POST /api/purchase-returns - Full return marks lot as RETURNED, deletes purchase
GET /api/lots/:id - Verifies lot status changes to RETURNED after full return
GET /api/purchase-returns - Lists all returns with proper data
GET /api/purchase-returns/:id - Returns specific return with items
Error handling for invalid purchase IDs and missing fields
No CHECK constraint errors when setting RETURNED status
